author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Recovered ferrotorch comment 2df7313e (issue aa038f4b, ferrotorch local #1597). Power outage truncated the JSON to 0 bytes. Restored byte-for-byte from hub creation commit 1ceadb088 via 'git show <sha>:<path> > <path>' — identical to git blob, valid JSON, original Ed25519 signature intact (signed_by SHA256:YWYNpJtV...). Corruption had been committed over good history by d1a2ffafc 'sync: auto-stage dirty hub state (recovery)' (-10 lines).
